tasks.label: Run Timeline App
tasks.command: if [ -x ./build/Desktop_Qt_6_9_3-Debug/ai-timeline ]; then ./build/Desktop_Qt_6_9_3-Debug/ai-timeline; elif [ -x ./build/Desktop_Qt_6_9_3-Debug/ai-timline ]; then ./build/Desktop_Qt_6_9_3-Debug/ai-timline; else echo "No runnable binary found in ./build/Desktop_Qt_6_9_3-Debug"; exit 1; fi
